_comment: Copy to mcp_servers.json to attach additional MCP servers beyond the built-in Monarch Money integration. Each entry's tools run server-side by Anthropic against the url you give it -- only add servers you trust. auth.type is 'none' (no token) or 'bearer_env' (reads a static token from the named .env var). keywords is optional: omit or leave empty to always attach the server whenever enabled; list words/phrases to only attach it when a message mentions one (same behavior Monarch already uses for finance topics).
